response.overview: Jiwa is an art painting student who often receives praise from his lecturer. He has never painted a portrait until he meets Maya. Jiwa then hires Maya to be the subject of his painting, but Maya is not allowed to see the painting until it is completed. Jiwa and Maya marry after completing their studies, but their marriage is tested because Jiwa has a psychological illness that makes him a person who finds it difficult to express his emotions.
response.title: Jiwa Tanpa Jiwa
